headline: Is Comcast (CMCSA) One of the Top 10 Income Stocks with the Highest Upside Potential?
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is included among the Top 10 Income Stocks with the Highest Upside Potential. On June 12, Freedom Broker initiated coverage of Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) with a Hold rating. It also set a $29 price target on the shares. The analyst noted that Comcast remains the largest broadband provider in the United States. […]

headline: Roku For Sale? JPMorgan Sees Comcast As The Most Logical Buyer
summary: Roku Inc. (NASDAQ:ROKU) shares surged Friday after a report suggested the streaming platform is exploring a potential sale. Now, JPMorgan believes one name stands out from a crowded field of possible buyers. In a note following the report, analyst Cory Carpenter said Roku’s combination of TV operating system ownership and distribution into more than 100 million households makes it a strategic asset. headline: Fox to buy streaming pioneer Roku in a $22 billion deal
summary: Fox Corp. has agreed to buy the streaming pioneer Roku in a cash-and-stock deal valued at approximately $22 billion, including debt.  Roku will continue to be run as an open, partner-friendly platform, the companies said Monday, and there appears to be no immediate changes that customers will see.  Fox and Roku said that the combined company will become the third-largest player in U.S. television by share of viewing.

Fox and Roku said that the combined company will become the third-largest player in U.S. television by share of viewing.

headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Invests in UK Resort Expansion While Strengthening Broadband and Wireless Strategy
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) ranks among the best 5G stocks to buy right now. On June 4, Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) announced that it had agreed to invest over 6 billion pounds ($8.05 billion) in the United Kingdom to build and operate Universal’s first European resort, as the US media conglomerate seeks to grow its theme-park business.
